prerequisites: A Pendo subscription with the API enabled for your account, hosted in either the US instance (app.pendo.io) or the EU instance (app.eu.pendo.io).
A Pendo user with administrator privileges, since only admins can create and manage integration keys under Settings > Integrations.

An integration key generated in Pendo, supplied to the connector as the required api_key field. Read access is sufficient for extracting data; enable write access on the key only if you also need to push data.

authMethods.name: Integration key (API key)
authMethods.summary: The Pendo Engage API authenticates with an integration key sent on every request in the x-pendo-integration-key HTTP header. Provide this value as the connector's api_key field. Generate the key in Pendo under Settings > Integrations > Integration Keys; the key is shown only once, so store it securely.

setupSteps.title: Sign in to Pendo as an administrator
setupSteps.body: Log in to your Pendo subscription with an account that has administrator privileges. Integration keys can only be created and managed by admins.

setupSteps.title: Create an integration key
setupSteps.body: Go to Settings > Integrations > Integration Keys, then select Add Integration Key. Enter a meaningful description so the key is identifiable later. Leave the key as read-only for extracting data; enable write access only if you intend to send data back to Pendo. Save the generated key value immediately, as it is displayed only once.

setupSteps.title: Provide the key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the integration key as the connector's api_key field. The connector sends it on each request in the x-pendo-integration-key header to authenticate against the Pendo Engage API.

setupSteps.title: Confirm your region
setupSteps.body: Pendo serves the API from a region-specific host that matches the URL you use to log in: https://app.pendo.io/api/v1 for the US instance or https://app.eu.pendo.io/api/v1 for the EU instance. Make sure the connector targets the host for the region where your subscription is hosted.

sources.title: API only returns data from one application - Pendo Support (region base URLs)
